judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent computed totals from QuoteLineItem in the sales_pipeline DB (joining Quote→Opportunity→Contract) rather than calculating order sales from OrderItem in products_orders as required by the Sales Amount Policy, leading to the wrong agent Id.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: yes
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After correctly filtering recent contracts, the agent wrongly computed “sales figures” by summing sales_pipeline.OpportunityLineItem TotalPrice grouped by Opportunity.OwnerId—never using products_orders.Order/OrderItem or the Quantity*UnitPrice policy—thus answering a different question than “top sales for orders,” leading to the wrong agent Id.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent’s final query (function-call-2357984009425399859) computed totals using OpportunityLineItem and QuoteLineItem in the sales_pipeline database rather than using Order/OrderItem (Quantity × UnitPrice) from the products_orders database as required by the Sales Amount Policy, resulting in the wrong agent Id.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: yes
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent computed sales by summing OpportunityLineItem quantities multiplied by PricebookEntry.UnitPrice for opportunities filtered by Contract.CompanySignedDate and grouped by Opportunity.OwnerId, instead of using orders and OrderItem (Quantity * UnitPrice) and Order ownership as required, leading to the wrong top agent.

B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent calculated totals from OpportunityLineItem records filtered by Contract.CompanySignedDate and priced via PricebookEntry, grouping by Opportunity OwnerId, instead of using Order and OrderItem within the last five months (and OrderItem.UnitPrice), leading to an incorrect agent Id.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@
